launchProofEvidenceFields.label: Pages site proof
launchProofEvidenceFields.value: html_url=https://biojuho.github.io/BIOJUHO-Projects/; status=not available; proof_source=live_url_http; live_http=200; live_url_ready=true; https_enforced=true
launchProofEvidenceFields.required: GitHub Pages proof must provide html_url, HTTPS enforcement, and either API status=built or live URL HTTP 2xx.
launchProofEvidenceFields.nextAction: Run gh api repos/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/pages and the live URL check after the Pages workflow succeeds, then paste html_url, status or live_http=2xx, and https_enforced=true.

launchProofEvidenceFields.label: Pages workflow run proof
launchProofEvidenceFields.required: Latest joopark-pages.yml run must be completed successfully and linked.
launchProofEvidenceFields.nextAction: Run gh run list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --workflow joopark-pages.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,headSha,createdAt,updatedAt,event,displayTitle and paste status=completed, conclusion=success, url, and headSha.

launchProofEvidenceFields.label: Drift Watch workflow run proof
launchProofEvidenceFields.required: Latest joopark-drift-watch.yml run must be completed successfully and linked.
launchProofEvidenceFields.nextAction: Run gh run list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --workflow joopark-drift-watch.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,headSha,createdAt,updatedAt,event,displayTitle and paste status=completed, conclusion=success, url, and headSha.

launchProofEvidenceFields.label: Evidence freshness proof
launchProofEvidenceFields.required: Saved evidence must be generated after dispatch and remain inside the freshness window.
launchProofEvidenceFields.nextAction: Run node scripts/capture-publish-evidence.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write after both workflow runs succeed, then paste generatedAt, evidenceFresh=true, evidenceExpiresAt, and postPublishEvidenceReady=true.

launchProofEvidenceFields.label: Release receipt proof
launchProofEvidenceFields.required: Post-launch verification receipt must be archive-ready only after live Pages, workflow evidence, and the external claim guard are ready.
launchProofEvidenceFields.nextAction: Run node scripts/capture-publish-evidence.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --markdown and paste the archive-ready post-launch verification receipt only after readyForExternalClaim=true.

launchProofEvidenceFields.label: Public claim guard proof
launchProofEvidenceFields.value: repoEvidenceReady=true; pagesEvidenceReady=true; workflowEvidenceReady=true; allDispatchReady=false; launchPacketReadyForExternalClaim=false; readyForExternalClaim=false
launchProofEvidenceFields.required: Public claim remains blocked until release quality, live proof, and launch-packet external-claim guard are all true.
launchProofEvidenceFields.command: copy System Status quality receipt after readyForExternalClaim=true
launchProofEvidenceFields.nextAction: Run node scripts/capture-output-quality-audit.mjs --write after live proof is ready, then paste readyForExternalClaim=true and the external claim guard receipt.

launchProofEvidenceReceipt:
JooPark Launch Proof Evidence Receipt
Status: guarded until external claim ready
Repo: biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects
Evidence repo: biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects
Repo resolution: source_repo

Evidence fields to fill:
- Pages site proof: html_url=https://biojuho.github.io/BIOJUHO-Projects/; status=not available; proof_source=live_url_http; live_http=200; live_url_ready=true; https_enforced=true
- Pages workflow run proof: status=completed; conclusion=success; url=https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/actions/runs/27172911727; headSha=e1f6623c339dc68a19a491f1c9ff85dde871b9b2
- Drift Watch workflow run proof: status=completed; conclusion=success; url=https://github.com/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/actions/runs/27172911738; headSha=e1f6623c339dc68a19a491f1c9ff85dde871b9b2
- Evidence freshness proof: generatedAt=2026-06-11T07:28:17.951Z; evidenceFresh=true; evidenceExpiresAt=2026-06-12T07:28:17.951Z; postPublishEvidenceReady=true
- Release receipt proof: postLaunchVerificationReceipt=available; status=not verified for archive
- Public claim guard proof: repoEvidenceReady=true; pagesEvidenceReady=true; workflowEvidenceReady=true; allDispatchReady=false; launchPacketReadyForExternalClaim=false; readyForExternalClaim=false

Required proof commands:
1. gh api repos/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/pages
2. gh run list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --workflow joopark-pages.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,headSha,createdAt,updatedAt,event,displayTitle
3. gh run list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --workflow joopark-drift-watch.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,headSha,createdAt,updatedAt,event,displayTitle
4. node scripts/capture-publish-evidence.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write
5. node scripts/capture-publish-evidence.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --markdown
6. copy System Status quality receipt after readyForExternalClaim=true

Next proof actions:
1. Pages site proof: nextAction=Run gh api repos/biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects/pages and the live URL check after the Pages workflow succeeds, then paste html_url, status or live_http=2xx, and https_enforced=true.
2. Pages workflow run proof: nextAction=Run gh run list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --workflow joopark-pages.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,headSha,createdAt,updatedAt,event,displayTitle and paste status=completed, conclusion=success, url, and headSha.
3. Drift Watch workflow run proof: nextAction=Run gh run list --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --workflow joopark-drift-watch.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,conclusion,url,headSha,createdAt,updatedAt,event,displayTitle and paste status=completed, conclusion=success, url, and headSha.
4. Evidence freshness proof: nextAction=Run node scripts/capture-publish-evidence.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --write after both workflow runs succeed, then paste generatedAt, evidenceFresh=true, evidenceExpiresAt, and postPublishEvidenceReady=true.
5. Release receipt proof: nextAction=Run node scripts/capture-publish-evidence.mjs --live --repo biojuho/BIOJUHO-Projects --markdown and paste the archive-ready post-launch verification receipt only after readyForExternalClaim=true.
6. Public claim guard proof: nextAction=Run node scripts/capture-output-quality-audit.mjs --write after live proof is ready, then paste readyForExternalClaim=true and the external claim guard receipt.

Acceptance criteria:
- Pages site proof: GitHub Pages proof must provide html_url, HTTPS enforcement, and either API status=built or live URL HTTP 2xx.
- Pages workflow run proof: Latest joopark-pages.yml run must be completed successfully and linked.
- Drift Watch workflow run proof: Latest joopark-drift-watch.yml run must be completed successfully and linked.
- Evidence freshness proof: Saved evidence must be generated after dispatch and remain inside the freshness window.
- Release receipt proof: Post-launch verification receipt must be archive-ready only after live Pages, workflow evidence, and the external claim guard are ready.
- Public claim guard proof: Public claim remains blocked until release quality, live proof, and launch-packet external-claim guard are all true.
